titles.text: Negima! Magister Negi Magi: Private Lesson 2 - Ojama Shimasu Parasite de Chu
Mahou Sensei Negima! Private Lesson 2: Ojama Shimasu Parasite de Chu
Mahou Sensei Negima! Private Lesson 2: Ojama Shimasu Parasite de Chu

descriptions.text: Mahou Sensei Negima! Private Lesson 2: Ojama Shimasu Parasite de Chu is a Role-Playing game, developed and published by Marvelous Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 2006.
